name: Layer 3 — Orchestrator
what_it_solves: The 12-engine pipeline that composes contract-typed engines into a case resolution.
how_it_solves: SL is Phase 3.5 in the pipeline. Entry point: Orchestrator.resolve_case(patient_state) -> CaseResolution.
why_it_exists: Single choke-point for cross-cutting invariants (RUO, audit trail, tier clamps).
